original_question: how many Zoomcamps in a year?
expected_text:
There are 3 Zoom Camps in a year, as of 2024. However, they are for separate courses:
Data-Engineering (Jan - Apr)
MLOps (May - Aug)
Machine Learning (Sep - Jan)
There's only one Data-Engineering Zoom
paraphrased_queries: How often does Zoomcamp take place throughout the year?
Are there multiple Zoomcamp sessions in a single year?
How many times does Zoomcamp happen annually?

original_question: Is the current cohort going to be different from the previous cohort?
expected_text: Yes. For the 2024 edition we are using Mage AI instead of Prefect and re-recorded the terraform videos, For 2023, we used Prefect instead of Airflow..
paraphrased_queries: Will the new group be distinct from the one before it?

original_question: What is the expected duration of this course or that for each module?
expected_text: Approximately 3 months. For each module, about 1 week with possible deadline extensions (in total 6~9 weeks), 2 weeks for working on the capstone project and 1 week for peer review.
paraphrased_queries: How long does each module take to complete in these courses?

original_question: What’s the difference between the 2023 and 2022 course?
expected_text:
The difference is the Orchestration and Monitoring modules. Those videos will be re-recorded. The rest should mostly be the same.
Also all of the homeworks will be changed for the 2023 cohort.
paraphrased_queries: How do the 2023 and 2022 courses compare to each other?

expected_text: Yes, it will start in May 2024

original_question: What if my answer is not exactly the same as the choices presented?
expected_text: Please choose the closest one to your answer. Also do not post your answer in the course slack channel.

original_question: Are we free to choose our own topics for the final project?
expected_text: Please pick up a problem you want to solve yourself. Potential datasets can be found on either Kaggle, Hugging Face, Google, AWS, or the UCI Machine Learning Datasets Repository.
paraphrased_queries: Can we pick our own subjects for the final project?

paraphrased_queries: Will I still be able to graduate if I missed a week's homework?

original_question: For the final project, is it required to be put on the cloud?
expected_text:
You can get a few cloud points by using kubernetes even if you deploy it only locally. Or you can use local stack too to mimic AWS
